top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Ease From Record Highs, Oil Steadies: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian shares eased from record highs and oil held gains as efforts to revive a peace deal with Iran showed little progress.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bloom CEO Has No Plans to Sell Shares After AI Investor Run-up
top_signals.summary: Bloom Energy Corp., a supplier to Oracle Corp. that’s seen its stock price double in the past two months, doesn’t see a need to sell shares to meet surging demand from data centers, its chief executive officer says.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Asia-Pacific stocks open lower as uncertainty over U.S.-Iran peace talks dents sentiment
top_signals.summary: Asia-Pacific markets open mixed on Tuesday as investors weighed renewed uncertainty over U.S.-Iran peace negotiations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
